summary: Tested GPS auto-centering bug fix for Cape Canaveral. Backend APIs working correctly - Cape Canaveral (28.3922, -80.6077), Cocoa Beach, Melbourne FL are in COASTAL_SNAP_POINTS. Frontend MapPage.js has hasAutocenteredRef to prevent multiple centers. Map loads successfully with clustering, IP geolocation fallback works.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - AttributeError: PRO_PHOTOGRAPHER

critical_code_review_comments: GPS auto-centering fix is correctly implemented in MapPage.js lines 534-556
hasAutocenteredRef prevents multiple map centers - good pattern
effectiveLocation useMemo correctly prioritizes GPS over IP location
Cape Canaveral (28.3922, -80.6077), Cocoa Beach (28.3200, -80.6076), Melbourne FL (28.0836, -80.6081) are in COASTAL_SNAP_POINTS
Space Coast cities are in COASTAL_CITIES set for coastal detection
IP geolocation with coastal_snap=true returns all required fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS auto-centering bug fix verified. Map auto-centers on effectiveLocation (GPS or IP) when available. hasAutocenteredRef prevents re-centering. Cape Canaveral and Space Coast cities are in coastal snap database. Admin Spots tab shows 80 spots across 13 countries with Import Spots button for Tier 2/3 import.

gps_auto_centering.details: MapPage.js has hasAutocenteredRef (line 534) and useEffect (lines 535-556) that auto-centers map on effectiveLocation when available. Console logs show [MAP] Auto-centering on {source} location.

cape_canaveral_coastal_snap.details: Cape Canaveral (28.3922, -80.6077), Cocoa Beach (28.3200, -80.6076), Melbourne FL (28.0836, -80.6081) are in COASTAL_SNAP_POINTS in geolocation.py

ip_geolocation_coastal_snap.details: API returns success, latitude, longitude, coastal_snapped, is_coastal, city fields correctly

admin_spots_tab.details: Shows 80 spots across 13 countries, Import Spots button visible, search/filter working

map_clustering.details: Map loads with Leaflet clustering, shows clustered markers (3, 2, 2, 4, 6 spots in different areas)

tier_import_dialog.details: Import Spots button visible in Admin Spots tab for Tier 2/3 import
